logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to logout?
pp_intro: At Vidharthi Store, your privacy is very important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.
pp_1_desc: We may collect personal information such as your name, phone number, email address, delivery address, and payment details when you use our app.
pp_2_desc: We use your information to process orders, provide customer support, improve our services, and send important updates.
pp_3_desc: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.
pp_4_desc: We do not sell or rent your personal information to third parties. Information may be shared with trusted service providers only for order fulfillment.
pp_5_desc: Our app may use cookies and tracking technologies to enhance user experience and analyze app performance.
pp_6_desc: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information. You may contact us for any privacy-related concerns.
pp_7_desc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be reflected on this page.
rr_intro: At Vidharthi Store, we strive to ensure complete customer satisfaction. This policy outlines our return and refund process.
rr_1_desc: Products can be returned within 7 days of delivery if they are:
rr_2_desc: The following items cannot be returned:
rr_3_desc: Once your return request is approved, refunds will be processed within 5 7 business days to your original payment method.
rr_4_desc: Customers may choose a replacement instead of a refund, subject to product availability.
rr_5_desc: Orders can be cancelled before dispatch. Once shipped, cancellation may not be possible.
rr_6_desc: For return or refund requests, please contact our support team through the app or email us at support@vidharthistore.com.
contact_subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Send us your queries anytime.
invalid_name: Enter your full name (at least 2 characters)
